message:
docs: add comprehensive ARCHITECTURE.md

Implements bd-vli7 - Architecture overview document

Covers:
- Crate structure and dependency graph
- Request lifecycle with detailed flow diagram
- Key design decisions:
  - Zero-copy HTTP parsing
  - Structured concurrency with asupersync
  - Compile-time route validation
  - Type-driven extraction
  - FastAPI-compatible errors
- Dependency injection resolution flow and scopes
- Middleware architecture (onion model)
- Testing infrastructure
- Extension points for custom extractors/middleware/dependencies
- Performance considerations
- File organization

Essential for onboarding contributors and understanding the system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
